docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEE, SAMUEL AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, BENNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SAMUEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED MAR-04-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, BENNY
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SAMUEL
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT HUANG, BENNY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SAM LAM AS CANTONESE INTERPRETER. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, SAMUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, BENNY $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,115.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF LEE, SAMUEL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, BENNY
